name: Sean Beld
quote: Phil approaches his work with a genuine care for accessibility, engaging thoughtfully with guidance and translating inclusive design principles into real practical improvements. Phil is not only a strong accessibility developer, but someone who continuously works to advocate for the rights of users with disabilities and uses his experience to educate and encourage others to do the same.

name: Thomas Giantonio
quote: Phil was an active member of the fun@work committee.  He always brought great ideas, and was energizing to the team. He played a lead role in the March 2026 event.

name: Previous Product Owner
quote: Phil takes ownership and genuinely care about making a good experience. When a workflow is messy or high stakes, he has a strong instinct for simplifying the experience without losing what the business actually needs.
